CVE-2018-14632.title: An out of bound write can occur when patching an Openshift object ...
CVE-2018-14632.summary: An out of bound write can occur when patching an Openshift object using the 'oc patch' functionality in OpenShift Container Platform before 3.7. An attacker can use this flaw to cause a denial of service attack on the Openshift master api service which provides cluster management.
